scripts.env:encrypt: dotenvx encrypt -f .env.dev -k POCKETBASE_ADMIN_PASSWORD -k EXA_API_KEY -k OLLAMA_API_KEY && dotenvx encrypt -f .env.prod -k POCKETBASE_ADMIN_PASSWORD -k POCKETBASE_SMTP_PASSWORD -k OLLAMA_API_KEY
scripts.dev: bun run build:static && bun run env:dev bun run build:caddy && bun run dev:pb:create-superuser && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names client,server,pb,caddy,mailpit,pbconfig --prefix-colors blue,green,yellow,cyan,red,white 'bun run dev:client' 'bun run dev:server' 'bun run dev:pb' 'bun run dev:caddy' 'bun run dev:mailpit' 'bun run dev:pb:config'
scripts.dev:client: bun run env:dev bun build src/client/main.tsx --outdir dist/static --target browser --env 'PUBLIC_*' --watch --no-clear-screen
scripts.dev:pb: bun run env:dev sh -c 'pocketbase serve --http "$POCKETBASE_HOSTNAME:$POCKETBASE_PORT" --migrationsDir src/pb_migrations --dir dev/pb_data --automigrate=0'
scripts.dev:pb:config: bun run env:dev bun run infra/scripts/configure-pocketbase.ts
scripts.dev:pb:create-superuser: bun run env:dev sh -c 'pocketbase --dir dev/pb_data superuser upsert "$POCKETBASE_ADMIN_EMAIL" "$POCKETBASE_ADMIN_PASSWORD"'
scripts.build: bun run generate:about && bun run build:client && bun run build:server && bun run build:static && bun run build:caddy
scripts.build:server: bun build src/server/serve.ts --outfile dist/server/serve --compile --target bun && find . -maxdepth 1 -name '*.bun-build' -delete
scripts.build:static: mkdir -p dist/static && cp src/static/index.html src/static/robots.txt src/static/404.html dist/static/ && cp -r src/static/flags dist/static/flags && mkdir -p dist/static/.well-known && cp src/static/.well-known/security.txt dist/static/.well-known/ && rsync -a --delete src/pb_migrations/ dist/pb_migrations/
scripts.test:e2e: rm -rf e2e/test-results e2e/playwright-report && bun run env:dev playwright test
scripts.test:smoke: bun run env:prod bun run infra/scripts/smoke-test.ts
scripts.preversion: bun run check && bun run test
scripts.infra:deploy: bun run env:prod bun run infra/scripts/deploy.ts
